metadata.name: oscat
metadata.summary: A comprehensive library for managing directories and files.

methods.name: oscat.cat_os.CatFile.cat_manager
documentation: Sets up the cat manager file and writes initial content.

methods.name: oscat.cat_os.CatFile.do_tasks
documentation: Performs a series of tasks: sets cat space, creates directories, and initializes files.

methods.name: oscat.cat_os.CatFile.set_os_curser
documentation:
Sets the operating system cursor for CatOs or directory handling.
Input: attach_name (string) - The name to attach to the cursor.
       not_check (bool) - If True, skips existence checks.

methods.name: oscat.cat_os.CatFile.make_dir
documentation:
Creates a directory at the current cursor path if it does not exist.
Input: os_curser (string) - The path for the directory.

methods.name: oscat.cat_os.CatFile.delete
documentation: Deletes the CatOs or directory pointed to by the cursor.

methods.name: oscat.cat_os.CatFile.file_customize
documentation:
Customizes file operations: creates, writes, or reads files.
Input: path (string) - The file path.
       text (string) - The text to write to the file.
       read (bool) - If True, reads the file content.
       file_format (string) - The file extension.

methods.name: oscat.cat_os.CatFile.new_file
documentation:
Creates a new, empty CatOs at the cursor's current path.
Input: file_format (string) - The file extension.

methods.name: oscat.cat_os.CatFile.write_file
documentation:
Writes text to the CatOs at the current cursor path.
Input: text (string) - The text to write to the CatOs.

methods.name: oscat.cat_os.CatFile.read_file
documentation:
Reads the first line from the CatOs pointed to by the cursor.
Output: string - The content of the first line of the CatOs.

methods.name: oscat.cat_os.CatFile.copy
documentation:
Copies the CatOs or directory pointed to by the cursor to the specified destination path.
Input: dest_path (string) - The destination path where the CatOs or directory will be copied.

methods.name: oscat.cat_os.CatFile.rename
documentation:
Renames the CatOs or directory pointed to by the cursor.
Input: new_name (string) - The new name for the CatOs or directory.

methods.name: oscat.cat_os.CatFile.cut_and_paste
documentation:
Cuts (moves) the CatOs or directory to the specified destination path.
Input: dest_path (string) - The destination path where the CatOs or directory will be moved.

methods.name: oscat.cat_os.CatFile.transfer
documentation:
Transfers a CatOs or directory from source path to destination path.
Input: source_path (string) - The path of the source CatOs or directory.
       dest_path (string) - The path of the destination CatOs or directory.

methods.name: oscat.cat_os.CatFile.trash_file
documentation: Moves deleted files to a designated trash directory (placeholder for future implementation).

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.Os.windows_sep
documentation: This property returns the alternative separator for paths (like '/' on Windows)

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.Os.pathsep
documentation: This property returns the component separator in environmental paths (like ':' in Unix and ';' in Windows)

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.Os.linesep
documentation: This property returns the line separator in text files (like '\n' in Unix and '\r\n' in Windows)

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.Os.defpath
documentation: This property returns the default search path for executables

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.Os.devnull
documentation: This property returns the null device path (like '/dev/null')

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.Os.path
documentation: This property returns the appropriate path constructor (either posixpath or ntpath)

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.Os.name
documentation: This property returns the name of the operating system ('posix' or 'nt')

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.Os.curdir
documentation: This property returns the current directory ('.')

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.Os.pardir
documentation: This property returns the parent directory ('..')

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.Os.unlink
documentation: This method deletes a CatOs based on the OS type.
Input: path (string) - The path of the CatOs to be deleted.
Output: None (raises NotImplementedError if the OS type is unsupported)

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.Os.join
documentation: This method joins given paths into a single complete path.
Input: *paths (strings) - Multiple path components to be joined.
Output: string - The combined path as a single string.

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.Os.split
documentation: This method splits a given CatOs path into components using a specified separator. Input: path (string) - The
CatOs path to be split; sep (string, optional) - The separator to use (if not provided, uses default
separator). Output: list - The components of the CatOs path.

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.Os.split_path
documentation: This method splits the given path (string or bytes) into components based on the appropriate separators for the data type (str or bytes).
Input: path (str or bytes) - The path to be split.
Output: list - Components of the path based on the detected separator.

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.Os.path_exists
documentation:
Checks whether the given path exists or not.
Input: path (string) - The path to check.
Output: bool - True if the path exists, False otherwise.

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.Os.is_dir
documentation:
Checks whether the given path is a directory.
Input: path (string) - The path to check.
Output: bool - True if the path is a directory, False otherwise.

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.Os.is_file
documentation:
Checks whether the given path is a CatOs.
Input: path (string) - The path to check.
Output: bool - True if the path is a CatOs, False otherwise.

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.Os.work_space_path
documentation:
Retrieves the workspace path based on the given absolute path.
Input: path (string) - The absolute path to the workspace.
Output: string - The path to the workspace directory.

class_variables.name: oscat.cat_tree.Os.sep_b
documentation: Byte separator for backslash

class_variables.name: oscat.cat_tree.Os.seps_b
documentation: Byte separators for backslash and forward slash

class_variables.name: oscat.cat_tree.Os.colon_b
documentation: Byte colon separator

class_variables.name: oscat.cat_tree.Os.sep
documentation: String separator for backslash

class_variables.name: oscat.cat_tree.Os.seps
documentation: String separators for backslash and forward slash

class_variables.name: oscat.cat_tree.Os.colon
documentation: String colon separator

class_variables.name: oscat.cat_tree.Os.dat
documentation: The extension separator for files

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.CatTree.__init__
documentation: Initialize the CurserTree instance, setting up the paths and tree structure.

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.CatTree.cls_vars_initializer
documentation:
Initializes the class variables related to file paths and install path.
This method retrieves the current file's name, its absolute path, and sets the installation path.
Also sets the cat_curser by appending CatTreeProperties.cats_space_name to install path.

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.CatTree.set_cat_space
documentation: Sets the current cat space by creating a new branch with cat_curser.

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.CatTree.cls_structure_initializer
documentation:
Initializes the tree structure with the first branch.
The first branch contains status, curser_items, and target information.
Also adds the current os_curser to the history.

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.CatTree.do_tasks
documentation: An abstract method to be overridden by subclasses for performing specific tasks.

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.CatTree.initial_setup
documentation: Calls the methods to initialize class variables and tree structure, then performs tasks.

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.CatTree.branch_serializer
documentation:
Validates the structure of a branch to ensure it has the correct keys and types.
Returns True if the branch is valid, False otherwise.

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.CatTree.set_curser_items
documentation: Splits the provided path into its components and returns a list of non-empty items.

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.CatTree.target_default
documentation: Sets the default target to the last item in the split path components.

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.CatTree.get_target_from_path
documentation: Returns the default target for the given path.

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.CatTree.main_dirs_list
documentation: Lists the main directories at the given path.

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.CatTree.add_history
documentation: Adds the current branch to the history.

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.CatTree.dirs_list
documentation: Returns the set of main directories.

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.CatTree.os_cursor_restart
documentation: Restarts the OS cursor.

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.CatTree.add_branch
documentation:
Adds a new branch to the tree if all necessary keys are present and valid.
Input: kwargs (dict) - Contains keys 'curser_items', 'status', 'target', and 'title'.
Output: None. If the conditions are not met, logs an error.

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.CatTree.set_new_branch_info
documentation: Sets new branch information including status, curser_items, target, and title.

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.CatTree.set_branch
documentation:
Sets the current branch based on the inactive status and the provided path split.
Output: None. It modifies the tree structure by adding a new branch.

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.CatTree.new_branch
documentation:
Creates a new branch in the tree based on the provided path.
Input: path (string) - The path for which the branch is created.
       not_check (bool) - If True, branch is created without checking existence.
Output: None. Creates a branch if conditions are met.

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.CatTree.check_branch_title
documentation:
Checks if a branch with the given title exists and is inactive.
Returns the index of the branch if found, otherwise returns None.

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.CatTree.active_branch
documentation: Activates the branch at the given index and deactivates the current active branch.

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.CatTree.files_path_list
documentation: Returns a list of file paths and their corresponding notes for the given title.

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.CatTree.set_branch_space
documentation: Creates a new branch with the given space name and title.

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.CatTree.set_space
documentation: Sets the current space by either activating an existing branch or creating a new one.

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.CatTree.has_index_title
documentation: Checks if there is an index for the given branch title.

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.CatTree.os_ccc
documentation: Sets up and activates the ccat space, or creates a new branch if it doesn't exist.

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.CatTree.os_dcc
documentation: Sets up and activates the dcat space, or creates a new branch if it doesn't exist.

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.CatTree.cc_files
documentation: Returns the list of file paths and their corresponding notes for ccat space.

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.CatTree.dc_files
documentation: Returns the list of file paths and their corresponding notes for dcat space.

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.CatTree.get_key_name_list
documentation:
Retrieves a list of values for a given key from a list of dictionaries.
Input: key (string) - The key for which values are retrieved.
       curser_list (list) - The list of dictionaries to search.
Output: list - A list of values for the specified key.
Ensure the class definition ends properly

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.CatTree.tree_satus_list
documentation:
Returns a list of status values for each branch in the tree.
Output: list - List of boolean statuses of the tree branches.

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.CatTree.branch_status_list
documentation:
Retrieves the index of the active (True) status in the specified branch index.
Input: index (int) - The index of the branch to check.
Output: int - The index of the active status (True).

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.CatTree.tree_branch_active_index
documentation:
Gets the index of the currently active branch in the tree.
Output: int - The index of the active branch.

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.CatTree.target
documentation:
Retrieves the target item from the currently active branch.
Output: string - The target item from the active branch.

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.CatTree.targets_list
documentation:
Gets the list of items from the currently active branch.
Output: list - The list of cursor items from the active branch.

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.CatTree.target_index
documentation:
Retrieves the index of the target item in the list of cursor items.
Output: int - The index of the current target in the targets list.

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.CatTree.inactive_branch_status_list
documentation:
Marks the current active branch as inactive.
Output: None. Modifies the status of the active branch.

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.CatTree.is_curser_valid
documentation:
Checks if the current cursor path exists.
Output: bool - True if the cursor path exists, False otherwise.

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.CatTree.add_to_branch
documentation:
Adds a file or directory name to the current branch's cursor items.
Input: file_or_dir_name (string) - The name to add to the branch.
Output: None. Modifies the current branch by adding the new name.

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.CatTree.set_target
documentation:
Sets the target of the current branch to the provided file or directory name.
Input: file_or_dir_name (string) - The name to set as the target.
Output: None. Modifies the target of the active branch.

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.CatTree.is_file
documentation:
Checks if the current cursor points to a file.
Output: bool - True if it is a file, otherwise False.

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.CatTree.is_directory
documentation:
Checks if the current cursor points to a directory.
Output: bool - True if it is a directory, otherwise False.

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.CatTree.attach_cursor
documentation:
Attaches a new file or directory name to the current cursor if it does not already exist.
Input: file_or_dir_name (string) - The name to attach.
       not_check (bool) - If True, attach without checking for validity.
Output: None. Modifies the current tree structure or logs an error if invalid.

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.CatTree.os_curser
documentation:
Constructs the cursor path as a string from the targets list.
Output: string - The constructed cursor path.

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.CatTree.os_curser_split
documentation:
Splits the current cursor path into its components.
Output: list - The components of the cursor path.

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.CatTree.forward
documentation:
Advances the cursor to the next target in the list if possible.
Output: None. If at the end, prints a message indicating the end of cursor history.

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.CatTree.back
documentation:
Moves the cursor back to the previous target in the list.
Output: None. Modifies the current target to the previous one.

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.CatTree.branch_back
documentation:
Moves back to the previous branch, marking the current branch as inactive.
Output: None. Modifies the status of branches or prints a message if at the first branch.

methods.name: oscat.cat_tree.CatTree.branch_forward
documentation:
Advances to the next branch, marking the current branch as inactive.
Output: None. Modifies the status of branches or prints a message if at the last branch.
